mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, name, gender, birth FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, email, password, name, gender, birth FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.gender, u.birth FROM users u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_auth ua WHERE ua.user_id = u.id AND ua.auth = 'ROLE_ADMIN' ) ORDER BY u.created_at DESC, u.id DESC

SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.gender, u.birth FROM users u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.id != #{userId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_auth ua WHERE ua.user_id = u.id AND ua.auth = 'ROLE_ADMIN' ) ORDER BY u.created_at DESC, u.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( email, password, name, gender, birth, created_at ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birth}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO user_auth ( user_id, auth, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{auth}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, birth = #{birth}, gender = #{gender}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET email = 'deleted_' || id || '@deleted.local', deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
